items.title: MrBeast's company sued by ex-employee over sexual harassment claim
items.dek: Beast Industries has strongly denied claims of sexual harassment and workplace gender bias.
items.body: Beast Industries has strongly denied claims of sexual harassment and workplace gender bias.

items.title: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
items.dek: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.
items.body: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.

items.title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
items.dek: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.
items.body: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.
